description: backend: cargo build --release + GitHub Release workflow
context: Create .github/workflows/release.yml: triggered on tag push v*.*.*. Jobs: build-linux (cargo build --release, tar worker/ + binary + anvilml.toml + backend/seeds/), build-windows (cross-compile or windows runner, zip). Upload artifacts. Create release notes from CHANGELOG. Generate SHA256SUMS file. cargo build --release exits 0; release zip contains anvilml binary + worker/ directory + anvilml.toml.

Ensure install_worker_deps.sh (Linux/macOS): detects nvidia-smi->cuda, amdgpu/rocminfo->rocm, else cpu; creates venv via uv or python3.12 -m venv; pip install base.txt then cuda/rocm-linux/cpu.txt; exits non-zero if Python 3.12 missing. Ensure install_worker_deps.ps1 (Windows): same logic; AMD detection via Get-CimInstance or amd-smi; installs rocm-windows.txt for ROCm. bash -n exits 0 for .sh; PSScriptAnalyzer passes for .ps1.
